subject: ela
description: Describe how words and phrases (e.g., regular beats, alliteration, rhymes, repeated lines) supply rhythm and meaning in a story, poem, or song.

description: Fantasy: magical or imaginary worlds (dragons, powers, etc.)

description: Historical Fiction: stories set in the past with real-world context

description: Realistic Fiction: stories that could happen in real life

description: Folktales: stories passed down — trickster tales, cultural stories, etc.

description: Fables: short stories with a moral (often with animals)

description: Legends: based on real people/events but exaggerated

description: Myths: explain natural events or beliefs

description: Short Stories: complete narratives in brief format

description: Vignettes: short, descriptive scenes (no full plot required)

description: Biographies: write a passage about a relevant person from past or present

description: Historical Accounts: write a passage about real events brought to life with storytelling

subject: ela
description: True Adventure Stories: survival stories, exploration, real-life challenges
